texto: The more you test him, the slower he will learn and the less he'll want to do. The less you test him, the quicker he will learn and the more he'll want to learn. Knowledge is the most precious gift you can give your child. Give it as generously as you give him food.
explicacao: Citação de Glenn Doman sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “The more you test him, the slower he will learn and the less he'll want to do. The less you test …” articula sabedoria, knowledge, learning em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como learning e parenting.
